tasks.label: dev:prepare
args: set -euo pipefail; mkdir -p .tmp data; BACKEND_PORT=""; for PORT in 11200 11201 11202 11203; do if ss -ltn | rg -q ":${PORT}\\b"; then continue; fi; BACKEND_PORT="${PORT}"; break; done; if [ -z "${BACKEND_PORT}" ]; then echo "[dev:prepare] no available backend port in 11200-11203"; exit 1; fi; BACKEND_URL="http://localhost:${BACKEND_PORT}"; echo "BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT}" > .tmp/dev.env; echo "BACKEND_URL=${BACKEND_URL}" >> .tmp/dev.env; echo "FRONTEND_PORT=5173" >> .tmp/dev.env; echo "[dev:prepare] backend -> ${BACKEND_URL}, frontend -> http://localhost:5173"

tasks.label: dev:backend
args: set -euo pipefail; test -f .tmp/dev.env; source .tmp/dev.env; CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_HTTP_ADDRESS=":${BACKEND_PORT}" CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_PUBLIC_BASE_URL="${BACKEND_URL}" CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_MANAGED_TEMPLATE_BASE_URL="${BACKEND_URL}" go run ./cmd/server

tasks.label: dev:web
args: set -euo pipefail; test -f .tmp/dev.env; source .tmp/dev.env; PIDS="$(lsof -tiTCP:${FRONTEND_PORT} -sTCP:LISTEN || true)"; if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then echo "[dev:web] port ${FRONTEND_PORT} is in use, killing: $PIDS"; kill $PIDS || true; sleep 1; fi; VITE_CHAIN_SUBCONVERTER_API_PROXY_TARGET="${BACKEND_URL}" npm run dev

tasks.label: dev:stop
args: set -euo pipefail; BACKEND_PORT=11200; FRONTEND_PORT=5173; if [ -f .tmp/dev.env ]; then source .tmp/dev.env; fi; for PORT in ${BACKEND_PORT} ${FRONTEND_PORT}; do PIDS="$(lsof -tiTCP:${PORT} -sTCP:LISTEN || true)"; if [ -n "$PIDS" ]; then echo "[dev:stop] stopping port ${PORT}: $PIDS"; kill $PIDS || true; fi; done
